title: Lifestyle Hub — Concept & Build Plan
summary: Build plan generalizing HabitTracker into a local-first lifestyle hub with typed domain items (habits, rules, collections, ideas, clips), phased delivery, and migration constraints.
scope: Seed strategy and curated collection presets
notes: Type SPEC set by MANIFEST_TYPE (authoritative). Document is a phased build plan with locked decisions (section 1, treat as locked per prompt), per-phase acceptance criteria (section 6), a success bar (section 10), open questions (section 8), and deferred items (section 11). Self-status reads 'planning only (not approved to build)' and locked decisions are product/design decisions rather than Accepted ADR entries, so locked=false per schema rule (only Accepted ADRs are locked). Cross-references Docs/SCHEMA_MIGRATION_PLAYBOOK.md for migration constraints.
